description: The ToUpper node takes in a character or string and outputs it as uppercase. This node takes into account the local user's CultureInfo.

notes.title: See also
notes.text:
* ToLower to turn strings or characters lowercase.
* Microsoft documentation for the ``String.ToUpper() method``, which is used internally.

ProtoFlux:Strings:Characters
ProtoFlux:Strings:Formatting
